# MuleSoft Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (2.1) of Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/windows-powershell-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/windows-powershell-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/windows-powershell-connector/latest/microsoft-powershell-connector-examples.md)
- [Microsoft Windows PowerShell Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/windows-powershell-connector/latest/microsoft-powershell-connector-reference.md)
